people.text: Alina wants to volunteer with animals, but she can only help once a month. She prefers practical tasks outdoors rather than office work. They also want clear information before deciding, so they can choose with confidence.

Chris wants to help older people and practise conversation skills. He is available by phone in the evenings but cannot travel across town. They also want clear information before deciding, so they can choose with confidence.

Beth wants environmental volunteering with other students. She is free on Saturday mornings and wants training because she has no experience. They also want clear information before deciding, so they can choose with confidence.

Diego wants to use his computer skills to help a charity. He prefers flexible work he can do from home during the week. They also want clear information before deciding, so they can choose with confidence.

Naomi wants to volunteer at a weekend event with children. She enjoys games and crafts but does not want a long-term weekly commitment. They also want clear information before deciding, so they can choose with confidence.

texts.text: Animal Meadow needs volunteers one Sunday each month to clean outdoor areas, prepare food and help care for rescued animals. No office tasks are required, but volunteers should be comfortable working in all weather. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

Evening Chat Line connects volunteers with older people who would like friendly phone conversations. Calls are made from home between 6 p.m. and 9 p.m. Training is provided, and volunteers do not need to visit anyone. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

Green Saturday Team meets at 9:30 a.m. every Saturday to plant trees, collect litter and improve local paths. Many volunteers are students, and beginners receive tools, safety advice and training before starting. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

Charity Digital Help looks for volunteers who can update websites, design simple posters or solve computer problems remotely. Tasks are sent by email, and volunteers choose what they can complete during the working week. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

Kids Festival Helpers are needed for a two-day weekend event. Volunteers run simple games, painting tables and craft activities for children. It is a short-term opportunity, and people can choose one or both days. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

Animal Office Support needs volunteers every Tuesday to answer emails and organise donation records. The work helps rescued pets, but it is indoors and requires a regular weekly commitment. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions.

Senior Visits Group arranges home visits for older residents during weekday mornings. Volunteers must travel to different parts of the town. It suits people who can visit regularly, not those available only by phone. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

River Experts Project studies water quality with specialist equipment. Volunteers need previous environmental experience and must attend on Wednesday afternoons. It is not designed for students looking for basic weekend training. Visitors receive clear information before booking, and staff are happy to answer simple questions. The service is easy to understand, with practical details clearly explained for new users.

answers.explanation: Alina needs monthly outdoor practical work with animals; A fits.
Chris wants to help older people by evening phone from home; B matches.
Beth needs Saturday environmental work with students and training; C fits.
Diego wants flexible remote charity work using computer skills; D matches.
Naomi wants a short weekend childrenâ€™s event with games and crafts; E fits.
